title: Vidarbha Cotton Growers FPC
description: Formation, board training, compliance setup and carbon credit enrollment for 340 cotton farmers across 12 villages in Wardha district. First carbon payment in Year 1.

title: Koraput Tribal Agroforestry FPC
description: Agroforestry carbon project for 520 tribal farmers. Enrolled 1,800 hectares under Verra VCS. Impact documentary attracted new CSR donor funding.

title: Raichur Mango Producers FPC
description: Digital transformation — member portal, crop tracking and export linkage for 180 farmers. Eliminated middlemen and tripled price realisation.

title: Bundelkhand Women Farmers Initiative
description: Multilingual educational content, WhatsApp advisory bot, and sustainability visibility for a women-led FPC with 260 members across 8 villages.
